johnfactotum/foliate-js
Pinned commit: 78914aef4466eb960965702401634c2cb348e9b1
License: MIT (see LICENSE)
Vendored for the Colophon in-browser reader. Do not edit in place.

vendor/pdfjs/ — Mozilla pdf.js (pdfjs-dist), used by foliate's pdf.js wrapper
for in-browser PDF rendering.
  Version: 5.5.207 (matches the pdf.js v5.5.207 the foliate wrapper targets)
  License: Apache-2.0
  Source: npm pdfjs-dist@5.5.207 — build/pdf.mjs, build/pdf.worker.mjs,
          cmaps/, standard_fonts/
  Plus text_layer_builder.css + annotation_layer_builder.css from
  mozilla/pdf.js tag v5.5.207 web/ (not shipped in pdfjs-dist).
  The foliate-js/pdf.js wrapper itself is from the pinned commit above.
